home.title: Choose a difficulty
home.hint: Difficulty levels build on each other. We recommend starting with difficulty <1>Easy</1>.
home.easyDesc: Perfect for beginners. Learn the mechanics.
home.mediumDesc: For advanced players. Faster reactions required.

achievements.title: Achievements
achievements.subtitle: Here you can see all unlocked and locked achievements.

easy.title: Easy mastered!
easy.subtitle: You completed all easy levels. Ready for more?

medium.title: Medium mastered!
medium.subtitle: Not bad! Now it gets serious.

hard.title: Game completed!
hard.subtitle: Incredible – you mastered all levels. Respect!

feedback.intro: Let us know how you like the game or what we can improve
feedback.name: Name

howToPlay.title: How To Play
howToPlay.description: Learn the rules and master every difficulty.

instructions.0: Press the button in the right moment!
instructions.2: Read the description on the button!
instructions.4: If you do not do what the button says, you lose.
instructions.6: The difficulties and levels are connected.
instructions.7: Maybe you will need something from the other levels.
instructions.8: It's advisable to start with difficulty Easy.

about.title: About the Game
about.description: We are Sara and Emily! We are students at the HWR in Berlin in the 4th semester. This is our game 'Press and Regret' inspired by another game that put our nerves to the test. 'Press and Regret' will challenge your reflexes and your patience. Enjoy the game! If you have any feedback, feel free to reach out in the contact section.

contact.title: Contact
contact.description: Found something we could do better? Or want to give us feedback? Just send us an email!
